text.tspan: UUID reference = assert-exists (lookup; a 404 rejects the whole operation atomically, no partial write). Free-text reference = auto-create with no lookup. Supplier code S/##### (first S/00001); item code DEP/SG/SSG/000001; both default PENDING_ONBOARDING. Supplier link is optional (null
allowed); item lines are required. Supplier and items resolve on parallel branches that join before the document is linked and persisted in one transaction.
